title: stenachaenium riedelii
intro: Stenachaenium riedelii, also known as the Riedel's stenachaenium or Riedel's hairy stenachaenium, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are derived from its chemical compounds. The health benefits of Stenachaenium riedelii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
